issues.description: Condition missing: should check if opponent has 3 or less Life cards. Current condition is 'Always' but card text requires 'OpponentLifeCount ≤ 3' or equivalent.
Action type wrong: should be 'FlipLife' (add card from top of deck to top of Life cards), not 'SearchDeck' to hand. SearchDeck puts card in hand; this effect adds to Life pile.
Extra effect present: second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and action 'PlaySelf' has no basis in card text and should be removed.
